{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Meteor Breath
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Meteor Breath]] is a [[Striker technique]] that releases a comet of earth and force madra.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
